---
title: "STA141A Final Report"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-17"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)

wildfires <- read.csv("../Data/wildfires_sample_100k.csv")

str(wildfires)
```

Abstract
Introduction (optional)

US wildfire data from 1992 to 2015

1. Data Preprocessing
```{r}
# filter notable fires, date formatting
wildfires1 <- wildfires %>% 
  filter(FIRE_SIZE >= 300) %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(DISCOVERY_DATE - 2440587.5, origin = "1970-01-01")) %>%
# column for month
  mutate(season = case_when(month %in% c('December', 'January', 'February') ~ 'winter', month %in% c('May', 'April', 'March') ~ 'spring', month %in% c('June','July','August'), month %in% c('September','October','November')))

head(wildfires1)

# make a variable for month and season

```

## 2. Exploratory Data Analysis

```{r}
# minimum output = 2 exploratory plots w interpretation
# How strong is seasonality?
# Are there trends over time?
```

## 3. Modeling

## 4. Model Fitting and Validation

## 5. Summary
